task_completion.description: Log into the Eramba GRC application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Continuity Plans module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Continuity' (or similar) section is highlighted or active in the Eramba navigation menu, and the corresponding page is displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Business Continuity Plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Add', 'Create', or 'New' Business Continuity Plan is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title for the Business Continuity Plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title input field in the form contains exactly 'Data Center Outage - Core Operations Recovery'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required details into the description field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description (or similar text area) field contains the required phrases: 'data center outage', 'Recovery Time Objective', 'Recovery Point Objective', '4 hours', and '1 hour'.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the new Business Continuity Plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly created 'Data Center Outage - Core Operations Recovery' plan is visible as an entry in the Business Continuity Plans list/table.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Eramba web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Eramba GUI is used for the actions. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text fields being filled are clearly part of the Eramba web application, not a generic text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely submitted the form rather than just typing the text and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the plan existing in a list view or a confirmation of creation, rather than just a filled-out form that was never submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title for the Business Continuity Plan is exactly 'Data Center Outage - Core Operations Recovery'. The description must contain the following required phrases: 'data center outage', 'Recovery Time Objective', 'Recovery Point Objective', '4 hours', and '1 hour'.
